text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 25 

STATUS_340B_CD 

LABEL: Code Indicating the Level of 340B Services Offered 

DESCRIPTION: For pharmacies that indicated they offer some level of 340B service (reference variable called 
STATUS_340B_IND), this variable identifies the level of 340B services offered. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: STATUS_340B_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: 36 = Site has no 340B
